feed.title: 单纯の小窝
feed.subtitle: 一个记录脚本的博客
feed.rights: All rights reserved 2020, 单纯の小窝

entry.title: 优化centos7网速与性能
entry.content:
1.增加系统文件描述符的最大限数
编辑文件 limits.conf

vi /etc/security/limits.conf

  •           soft    nofile           512000

  •           hard    nofile          1024000

vi /etc/pam.d/common-session

session required pam_limits.so

编辑vi /etc/sysctl.conf

max open files

fs.file-max = 1024000

max read buffer

net.core.rmem_max = 67108864

max write buffer

net.core.wmem_max = 67108864

default read buffer

net.core.rmem_default = 65536

default write buffer

net.core.wmem_default = 65536

max processor input queue

net.core.netdev_max_backlog = 4096

max backlog

net.core.somaxconn = 4096

resist SYN flood attacks

net.ipv4.tcp_syncookies = 1

reuse timewait sockets when safe

net.ipv4.tcp_tw_reuse = 1

turn off fast timewait sockets recycling

net.ipv4.tcp_tw_recycle = 0

short FIN timeout

net.ipv4.tcp_fin_timeout = 30

short keepalive time

net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_time = 1200

outbound port range

net.ipv4.ip_local_port_range = 10000 65000

max SYN backlog

net.ipv4.tcp_max_syn_backlog = 4096

max timewait sockets held by system simultaneously

net.ipv4.tcp_max_tw_buckets = 5000

TCP receive buffer

net.ipv4.tcp_rmem = 4096 87380 67108864

TCP write buffer

net.ipv4.tcp_wmem = 4096 65536 67108864

turn on path MTU discovery

net.ipv4.tcp_mtu_probing = 3

turn on TCP Fast Open on both client and server side

net.ipv4.tcp_fastopen = 3

保存生效
sysctl -p

vi /etc/profile
文件，加入
ulimit -SHn 1024000
然后重启服务器执行
ulimit -n
查询返回1024000即可。

entry.title: N1盒子 固件更新地址
VPS增加交换内存
entry.content:
解决内存低于512M的问题

一、创建文件

sudo dd if=/dev/zero of=/root/swap bs=1024 count=1024000

SSH 执行以上命令，创建一个名为 swapfile 的 1G 空文件（写 0 占用磁盘）。

二、制作为 Swap 文件

mkswap /root/swap

三. 授予权限

chmod 0600 /root/swap

四 . 启动

swapon /root/swap

五. vim /etc/fstab 或 vi //etc/fstab

添加

/root/swap swap swap defaults 0 0

：wq 保存

entry.title: DEAN FUJIOKA「Echo」Music Video
entry.content: <iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/-idvEIznptc" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

entry.title: V2ray 一键脚本
entry.content:
一件执行 选择 1 安装即可

bash <(curl -s -L https://git.io/v2ray.sh)

entry.title: 南阳移动与境外VPS默认修改DNS并永久保存
entry.content:
打开 /etc/resolv.conf

修改为

nameserver 8.8.8.8
nameserver 211.138.24.66
nameserver 211.138.30.66
nameserver 211.138.180.2
nameserver 211.138.180.3

注意使用下面命令后 将永远无法修改此文件 请谨慎使用

修改 /etc/resolv.conf 同时设置权限 权限全给

执行 chattr +i /etc/resolv.conf

最后执行 service NetworkManager restart 重启网卡

结束

entry.title: 修改azure gcp默认用户名密码
entry.content:
再也不用输入sudo su了

#!/bin/bash
echo root:Vicer |sudo chpasswd root
sudo sed -i 's/^#?PermitRootLogin./PermitRootLogin yes/g' /etc/ssh/sshd_config;
sudo sed -i 's/^#?PasswordAuthentication./PasswordAuthentication yes/g' /etc/ssh/sshd_config;
sudo reboot

粘贴自动执行 接着在连接信息输入 root Vicer 从新连接即可

entry.title: unZip安装
entry.content:
apt-get安装

               apt-get install zip

yum安装

             yum install -y unzip

entry.title: UnblockNeteaseMusic 一键部署脚本
entry.content:
执行

wget -N --no-check-certificate raw.githubusercontent.com/XIU2/SHELL/master/unblock163.sh && chmod +x unblock163.sh && bash unblock163.sh

设置端口

做好转发
